message:
feat(learn): complete Learning Hub UI redesign with Stripe-inspired aesthetics

Major visual overhaul following Stripe/Linear design principles:

Sidebar:
- Clean, minimal design with better typography (13px, semibold)
- Subtle progress bar with smooth animations
- Emerald green checkmarks for completed lessons
- Reduced visual noise with lighter borders

Content:
- Premium typography with generous line-height (1.8)
- Better heading hierarchy and spacing
- Clean lesson header with tabular-nums
- Refined "New here?" prompt with amber accent

Navigation:
- Elegant prev/next cards at page bottom
- Clean mobile nav bar with safe area padding
- Smoother transitions throughout

Technical:
- Removed rehypeHighlight (no rehype plugins)
- Fixed setTimeout memory leaks with cleanup refs
- Added try-catch for clipboard API

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
